converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Statler Hotel records
Statler Hotel (Cornell University)
Sayles, C. I. (Charles I.)
28-3-1801
5.3 cubic feet. 5.3 cubic feet.
1928-1988. Correspondence, publications, records, financial statements, bulletins. Includes correspondence, files concerning Statler's new wing; construction and engineering publications; other records of Cornell's Statler Inn; financial statements; photograph; and Statler Inn registration cards for Harry Truman, Barry Goldwater, and Robert Kennedy. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 1 27 - folder 1 ======= 1 27 - folder 1 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2077391
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
S. Lee, J. Parker, E. Engst
Date completed:
August 1979 November 198 August 1987
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, August 2003
Date modified:
Jude Corina, May 2016
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes correspondence of Professor Charles I. Sayles; files concerning Statler's new wing, 1952-1959; correspondence regarding equipment; construction and engineering publications; and other records of Cornell's Statler Inn. Also, financial statements from the Statler Inn and Alice Statler Auditorium; photograph of Statler Hotel and Inn employees, Christmas, 1986; and "Statler Hotel and Conference Center Operating Criteria," 1987-1988.
Also Statler Inn registration cards for Harry Truman, April 20, 1960; Barry Goldwater, January 26-27, 1961; and Robert Kennedy, September 28-29, 1964.
Cite As:
Statler Hotel records, #28-3-1801. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Biographical / Historical
The Statler Hotel on the Cornell campus was formerly known as the Statler Inn.
Hotels, taverns, etc. -- Furniture and equipment. Hotel management schools. Truman, Harry S., 1884-1972. Goldwater, Barry M. (Barry Morris), 1909-1998. Kennedy, Robert F., 1925-1968. Cornell University -- : Buildings.
